历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 18648 → 12913 → 11507 → 12190 → 12332 respectively. After 2021, there was a significant forward shift of about 5700 places, and in the last 3 years, it has been basically stable in the 11500–12300 range. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 12332. The enrollment plan for this university in Liaoning Province for Physics Category was 55 students in 2021–2022, 52 in 2023, 56 in 2024, and 60 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is drastically reduced to 32 students, a reduction of about 46.7% compared to 2025, significantly easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985/211/Double First-Class; ranked 25th in the 2026 Soft Science Ranking, consistently in the national top 30 in recent years, with strong comprehensive strength. The 2026 reputation evaluation is clearly negative, involving campus safety, management response, and admission cutoff signals. Douyin popularity is high (ranked 5th overall), with extremely high exposure on short video platforms. The 2025 submission anomaly is low attention. Chemistry A+, Marine Science A+, Biology A+, Statistics A+, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A, Mathematics A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, Chemical Engineering and Technology A-, Law A-, etc., with comprehensive coverage of science, engineering, economics, and management disciplines.

Among Physics Category related majors, Computer Science is highly recommended, Electronics/Communication is highly recommended, Electrical Engineering is highly recommended, Mathematics/Statistics is recommended, and Energy and Power is recommended. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in this province, estimated at about 71.4% of the total in recent years, is approximately 142,800, a slight decrease of about 0.4% from 143,400 in 2025, with a slight easing of competition. Xiamen University is located in Fujian Province, which is an inter-provincial application for Liaoning candidates, with neutral regional preference.
